message:
fix: remove deprecated DeleteDogAgentBead that hard-deleted dog identity (gt-c89tv)

Dogs need persistent identity beads that accumulate work history across
assignments. DeleteDogAgentBead hard-deleted the bead, destroying the CV
chain. The function was already replaced by ResetDogAgentBead (added in
gt-fkgda) and had zero callers — removed as dead code.

Also updated DeleteAgentBead deprecation notice to direct users to
ResetAgentBeadForReuse instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
